name: AppBar
description: Top application bar with start, center, and end slots; sticky and elevated variants.

api.name: AppBar
api.description: Top application bar with start, center, and end slots; sticky and elevated variants.

parameters.name: Sticky
parameters.description: When true (default), pins to the top of the viewport.

parameters.name: Elevated
parameters.description: When true, adds a subtle shadow beneath the bar.

parameters.name: Bordered
parameters.description: When true (default), adds a bottom border.

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: Tailwind height class for the bar. Default is "h-14".

examples.title: Default AppBar
examples.code: Acme Corp

examples.title: With Search
examples.code:
<AppBar>
    <StartContent>
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Weight="semibold">Dashboard</Lumeo.Text>
    </StartContent>
    <ChildContent>
        <Input Placeholder="Search..." Class="max-w-xs h-8 text-sm" />
    </ChildContent>
    <EndContent>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">
            <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Bell" class="h-4 w-4" />
        </Button>
        <Avatar><AvatarFallback>JD</AvatarFallback></Avatar>
    </EndContent>
</AppBar>

examples.title: Appearance toggles — interactive
examples.code:
<Switch @bind-Checked="_elevated" />
<Switch @bind-Checked="_bordered" />
<AppBar Elevated="@_elevated" Bordered="@_bordered">
    <StartContent>
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Weight="semibold">My App</Lumeo.Text>
    </StartContent>
    <EndContent>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">Sign In</Button>
        <Button Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">Get Started</Button>
    </EndContent>
</AppBar>

@code {
    private bool _elevated = false;
    private bool _bordered = true;
}

examples.title: Elevated (no border)
examples.code:
<AppBar Elevated="true" Bordered="false">
    <StartContent>
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Weight="semibold">My App</Lumeo.Text>
    </StartContent>
    <EndContent>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">
            <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Settings" class="h-4 w-4" />
        </Button>
    </EndContent>
</AppBar>

mdSummary:
# AppBar

Top application bar with start, center, and end slots; sticky and elevated variants.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/app-bar

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| AppBar | StartContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AppBar | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AppBar | EndContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AppBar | Sticky | `bool` | `true` | When true (default), pins to the top of the viewport. |
| AppBar | Elevated | `bool` | `` | When true, adds a subtle shadow beneath the bar. |
| AppBar | Bordered | `bool` | `true` | When true (default), adds a bottom border. |
| AppBar | Height | `string` | `"h-14"` | Tailwind height class for the bar. Default is "h-14". |
| AppBar | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AppBar | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `StartContent` (AppBar) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (AppBar) — RenderFragment slot
- `EndContent` (AppBar) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<AppBar />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/AppBar/AppBar.razor`
